evals.prompt: Let's do a session retrospective — you made 3 mistakes today that I had to correct.
evals.expected_output: Extract correction signals: identify each of the 3 corrections. Classify root causes (Skill Missing / Incomplete / Trigger Miss). For each: cite the concrete conversation moment, propose one targeted fix (trigger alias, skill update, or new skill). Check for trigger misses — was a relevant skill available but not loaded? Update AGENTS.md. Log to AGENTS_LEARNING.md via common-learning-log.

evals.prompt: I noticed the agent kept ignoring the security skill when writing API endpoints. Add keywords to fix this.
evals.expected_output: Trigger Miss detected. Skill: common-owasp. Indirect phrase used: 'API endpoint'. Fix: add 'endpoint', 'route handler', 'REST' to triggers in AGENTS.md. Emit trigger-miss block with schema. Apply to all agent skill dirs in .skillsrc. Verify trigger rate improves to >= 80%.

evals.prompt: We need to improve our skills library based on this session's feedback.
evals.expected_output: Run retrospective protocol: (1) Extract all correction signals from the session. (2) Classify each root cause. (3) Propose one fix per root cause — extend existing skills before creating new ones. (4) Apply changes to all agent directories. (5) Output: correction count, skills changed, trigger misses found, estimated rounds saved.

should_not_trigger: Write a function to sort an array
